title: Directory-level architectural abstraction for lib/partition
description: The lib/partition directory is responsible for providing custom partitioners for use with Apache Hadoop MapReduce. These partitioners are used to partition keys based on certain criteria, such as a subset of the bytes in the key or the hash code of the key. The files in this directory collaborate by implementing the Partitioner interface and providing the necessary logic for partitioning keys. The architectural role of this directory is to provide flexibility and extensibility for custom partitioning strategies, allowing users to define their own partitioning logic without having to modify the core Hadoop codebase.
